title: What the Buddha Taught
subtitle: Revised and Expanded Edition
author: Walpola Rahula
themes: The Empirical Nature of Buddhist Teaching
Compassion as Natural Expression of Wisdom
excerpt: The finest single-volume introduction to the Buddha's original teaching as preserved in the Pali Canon. Walpola Rahula, a Buddhist monk and scholar, presents the Four Noble Truths, the Noble Eightfold Path, anatta (non-self), karma, rebirth, and nirvana with exceptional clarity, authority, and fidelity to the earliest sources.
